name: Elemental HERO Electrum
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｅ・ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エレメンタルヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> エリクシーラー
desc:
"Elemental HERO Avian" + "Elemental HERO Burstinatrix" + "Elemental HERO Clayman" + "Elemental HERO Bubbleman"
Must be Fusion Summoned. While face-up on the field, this card is also WIND, WATER, FIRE, and EARTH Attribute. When this card is Fusion Summoned: Shuffle all banished cards into the Deck(s). Gains 300 ATK for each monster your opponent controls with the same Attribute as this card.
mnst_eff:
"Elemental HERO Avian" + "Elemental HERO Burstinatrix" + "Elemental HERO Clayman" + "Elemental HERO Bubbleman"
Must be Fusion Summoned. While face-up on the field, this card is also WIND, WATER, FIRE, and EARTH Attribute. When this card is Fusion Summoned: Shuffle all banished cards into the Deck(s). Gains 300 ATK for each monster your opponent controls with the same Attribute as this card.
eff:
"Elemental HERO Avian" + "Elemental HERO Burstinatrix" + "Elemental HERO Clayman" + "Elemental HERO Bubbleman"
Must be Fusion Summoned. While face-up on the field, this card is also WIND, WATER, FIRE, and EARTH Attribute. When this card is Fusion Summoned: Shuffle all banished cards into the Deck(s). Gains 300 ATK for each monster your opponent controls with the same Attribute as this card.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 2: The Duel Academy Years Mega Pack

action: Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck by effect
Returns the player's banished cards to the Extra Deck
Returns the opponent's banished cards to the Deck
Returns the opponent's banished cards to the Extra Deck
summoning: Requires only specific monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Normal Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
